meta.name: Detect job and company changes with Lusha bulk enrichment and HubSpot

name: Contact Job Change & Promotion Enrichment with Lusha

parameters.content:
## Contact Job Change & Promotion Detection with Lusha

**Who it's for:** AEs & CSMs tracking champions and key contacts

**What it does:** Automatically detects when contacts change jobs or get promoted. Uses **bulk enrichment** to re-enrich all contacts in one API call, then compares against CRM data to detect changes. Updates CRM records and triggers follow-ups.

### How it works
1. Runs daily on a schedule
2. Reads existing contacts from CRM
3. Bulk re-enriches all contacts with Lusha in one call
4. Compares new vs. stored job/company data for each contact
5. Detects changes → updates CRM + alerts reps

### Setup
1. Install the Lusha community node
2. Configure CRM credentials
3. Add Lusha API credentials
4. Set the schedule (recommended: daily)
5. Configure Slack channel for alerts

A daily schedule trigger pulls your existing contacts from HubSpot for re-enrichment.

**Nodes:** Schedule Trigger → HubSpot Get Contacts

💡 Adjust the contact limit based on your Lusha API plan and contact volume.

All contacts are formatted and sent to the Lusha Bulk Enrichment API in a single call. Returns the latest job title, company, seniority, phone, and email for each contact.

**Nodes:** Format for Bulk → Lusha Bulk Enrich

📖 [Lusha API docs](https://www.lusha.com/docs/)

A code node compares fresh Lusha data against stored CRM records to detect job title or company changes. Changed contacts trigger a CRM update and a Slack notification to the assigned rep.

**Nodes:** Detect Changes → Has Changes? → Update CRM + Slack Alert

💡 Customize the Slack channel and message format to match your team's workflow.
